title: Local Government (Appointment of Local Government Administrator) (Kafue Town Council) Order, 2022
citation: Local Government (Appointment of Local Government Administrator) (Kafue Town Council) Order, 2022

sections.heading: This Order may be cited as the Local Government Title
sections.text:
This Order may be cited as the Local Government Title
(Appointment of Local Government Administrator) (Kafue Town
Council) Order, 2022.

sections.heading: The person named in the Schedule, being a public officer, Appointment
sections.text:
The person named in the Schedule, being a public officer, Appointment
is appointed as a Local Government Administrator for Kafue Town of Local
Government
Council. Administrator

sections.heading: The person appointed as a Local Government Administrator Functions of
sections.text:
The person appointed as a Local Government Administrator Functions of
Local
under paragraph 2 shall perform the functions of Kafue Town
Government
Council in accordance with the Act. Administrator

sections.heading: The Councillors of Kafue Town Council are suspended from Suspension of
sections.text:
The Councillors of Kafue Town Council are suspended from Suspension of
Councillors
performing their functions under the Act from the date of publication
of this Order.
Copies of this Statutory Instrument can be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101, Lusaka, Price K4.00 each
954 Statutory Instruments 4th November, 2022
SCHEDULE
(Paragraph 2)
Abel Siwakwi
G. NKOMBO,
LUSAKA Minister of Local Government
4th November, 2022 and Rural Development
[MLGRD/ 52 / 17 / 30 ]
